findings.title: plan.md is unfilled template — all placeholder text
findings.recommendation: Fill plan.md with actual technical context, architecture, and quality gates. Or if plan.md is unused for this rename, remove it or mark it intentionally minimal.

findings.title: spec.md status shows 'Draft' despite 100% completion
findings.recommendation: Update Status field from 'Draft' to 'Shipped' or 'Complete'.

findings.title: graph-metadata.json status shows 'planned' but packet shipped
spec.md _memory.continuity.completion_pct is 10, should be 100
findings.recommendation: Update completion_pct to 100 to match actual state.

findings.title: spec.md open questions unresolved — all relate to out-of-scope items
findings.recommendation: Either close with 'out of scope per §3' or explicitly defer with rationale.

findings.title: spec.md research references point to missing research.md
findings.recommendation: Research references to research/research.md:200,218,266 no longer resolve — the packet moved from 027/001 to 026/017 and research.md was not carried. Either carry the research file or update references to point to the original 027/001 location.

findings.title: spec.md metadata shows stale Branch name from scaffold phase
findings.recommendation: Branch field shows scaffold/001-rename-mcp-namespace-mk-spec-memory — update to reflect the actual commit branch or mark as N/A (shipped on main).

findings.title: implementation-summary verification says validate.sh Pending vs tasks.md T021 marked [x]
findings.recommendation: Align: either mark validate.sh as PASS in implementation-summary or unmark T021 and run it.

findings.title: No changelog entry for 017 in parent packet changelog (REQ-005)
findings.recommendation: Create changelog entry per REQ-005 documenting the rename and packet relocation.

findings.title: spec.md _memory.continuity.session_id from old location
